name: Zhejiang Huazheng New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: ZheJiang Huazheng New Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of epoxy resin copper clad laminates in China and internationally. The company also offers functional composites, thermoplastic honeycomb materials, and other new material products. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
